[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A vertical, game-like UI screen shows a central profile card with a character image, a name, a glowing emblem, and Japanese text on a dark blue background.

Main Subject: In the center is a rectangular profile card containing a small circular flag-like icon at the upper left of the card and a framed portrait image near the top. Beneath the portrait, a purple ribbon-shaped label displays the name “Rèzee” with a small star icon at the left. Below that, there is a glowing, stylized emblem with bright purple and gold highlights, and under the emblem appears Japanese text reading “トフライシ”. The card is surrounded by a larger, symmetrical UI design with vertical light-blue glow lines.

Setting: The image is entirely a digital graphic interface on a dark blue background with neon-like light effects; no real-world location or time of day is visible.

Visual Details: The overall color palette is dark navy and blue with cyan light streaks and highlights. The top portion includes a directional arrow icon on the upper left and Japanese text across the top reading “ランキングドラフト”. The central portrait is framed with a rounded rectangle and has a soft border. A gold banner with Japanese text “プレイ” sits near the bottom center. At the lower right, there is a circular badge with the word “NEW” and a plus sign, followed by a smaller symbol that includes a “+” and an unclear character. The camera view is straight-on, centered composition, with the UI elements aligned vertically.

Visible Text: ランキングドラフト  
3 ンス  
Rèzee  
トフライシ  
プレイ  
NEW

Practical Summary: The image shows a game interface card featuring a portrait, a highlighted name, and a glowing emblem with Japanese labels. Decorative arrows, neon lines, a gold “プレイ” button-like banner, and a “NEW” badge appear around the central card.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
